_comment: CUSTOMER policy library for one tenant. 'overrides' adjust native policies by id (subject to governance rules: critical natives cannot be disabled or have severity lowered; condition/threshold overrides only where the native policy sets allowed_by_native_policy=true; route_to overrides are always allowed). 'custom_policies' are brand-new tenant rules — every field shown on the example below is required.
name: Demo Customer Pte Ltd

custom_policies.name: VIP accounts require human approval before automated actions
